entities.name: HAVELI SYSTEM
entities.description: Traditional rainwater management system used for water security and landscape rehabilitation

entities.name: BUNDELKHAND REGION
entities.description: A region in Central India characterized as a fragile ecosystem

entities.name: CENTRAL INDIA
entities.description: Geographic region containing Bundelkhand

entities.name: WATER SECURITY
entities.description: The reliable access to an adequate quantity of acceptable quality water

entities.name: SURFACE RUNOFF
entities.description: Water that flows over the land surface during rainfall

entities.name: SURFACE RUNOFF HARVESTING
entities.description: The process of collecting and storing surface runoff for later use

entities.name: EARTHEN EMBANKMENTS
entities.description: Structures built to harvest surface runoff in fields

entities.name: POST-MONSOON PERIOD
entities.description: The time period following the monsoon season when cultivation traditionally occurs

entities.name: RESIDUAL SOIL MOISTURE
entities.description: Moisture remaining in the soil after the monsoon

entities.name: SUPPLEMENTAL IRRIGATION
entities.description: Additional water provided to crops beyond rainfall

entities.name: SHALLOW DUG WELLS
entities.description: Traditional water sources used for supplemental irrigation

entities.name: RAINFALL PATTERNS
entities.description: The distribution and frequency of precipitation over time

entities.name: STORM EVENTS
entities.description: Extreme weather events causing heavy rainfall

entities.name: HAVELI REJUVENATION
entities.description: The process of restoring and innovating traditional haveli systems

entities.name: MASONRY CORE WALL
entities.description: An innovative structural component used in haveli rejuvenation

entities.name: PARASAI-SINDH
entities.description: A pilot site used for monitoring landscape hydrology and productivity

entities.name: LANDSCAPE HYDROLOGY
entities.description: The study of water movement and distribution across the landscape

entities.name: LAND USE
entities.description: The management and modification of natural environment into built environment

entities.name: CROPPING INTENSITY
entities.description: The number of crops grown on a piece of land in a year

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit area

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: Precipitation received in the region

entities.name: VADOSE ZONE
entities.description: The unsaturated zone between the land surface and the water table

entities.name: GROUNDWATER LEVELS
entities.description: The depth or height of the water table in the soil

entities.name: PERMANENT FALLOW LANDS
entities.description: Agricultural lands that are left uncultivated for long periods

entities.name: PRODUCTIVE AGRICULTURE LANDS
entities.description: Lands that are actively used for crop production

entities.name: LAND AND WATER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ratio of output to the amount of land and water used

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD NET INCOME
entities.description: The total income of a household after expenses

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE NATURAL RESOURCE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The management of natural resources to maintain ecosystem services
